inputs.label: Beta/Gamma Dose
inputs.businessContext: Absorbed dose from beta particles or gamma rays.

businessContext_i18n.en: Absorbed dose from beta particles or gamma rays.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beta parçacıkları veya gama ışınlarından soğurulan doz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dose absorbée provenant des particules bêta ou des rayons gamma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dosis absorbida de partículas beta o rayos gamma.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Dose absorbée provenant des particules alpha.

inputs.label: Beta/Gamma Factor
inputs.businessContext: Radiation weighting factor for beta/gamma radiation (typically 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Radiation weighting factor for beta/gamma radiation (typically 1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beta/gama radyasyonu için radyasyon ağırlık faktörü (genellikle 1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de pondération pour le rayonnement bêta/gamma (généralement 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ponderación de radiación para radiación beta/gamma (típicamente 1).

inputs.label: Alpha Factor
inputs.businessContext: Radiation weighting factor for alpha particles (typically 20).

businessContext_i18n.en: Radiation weighting factor for alpha particles (typically 20).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alfa parçacıkları için radyasyon ağırlık faktörü (genellikle 20).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de pondération pour les particules alpha (généralement 20).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ponderación de radiación para partículas alfa (típicamente 20).

inputs.label: Neutron Factor
inputs.businessContext: Radiation weighting factor for neutrons (simplified, typically 5-20 depending on energy).

businessContext_i18n.en: Radiation weighting factor for neutrons (simplified, typically 5-20 depending on energy).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nötronlar için radyasyon ağırlık faktörü (basitleştirilmiş, enerjiye bağlı olarak genellikle 5-20).
businessContext_i18n.de: Strahlungswichtungsfaktor für Neutronen (vereinfacht, typischerweise 5–20 je nach Energie).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de pondération pour les neutrons (simplifié, généralement 5-20 selon l'énergie).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ponderación de radiación para neutrones (simplificado, típicamente 5-20 según la energía).

formulas.totalH: betaGammaDose * wR_betaGamma + alphaDose * wR_alpha + neutronDose * wR_neutron

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
